name: @harness/web
description: ISSUE-087 — the frontend substrate (UI analog of ISSUE-008). npm workspace holding the skin-swappable design-system core (web/shared) + the two Next.js App-Router apps the 13 surfaces render into: web/client (per-client deployment) + web/admin (the separate super-admin management plane, ADR-001 §7). Built skin-swappable per OD-197: design tokens as CSS variables + semantic components, no hardcoded styling in markup, so the operator's later HTML-dashboard retrofit is a reskin, not a rebuild.
